description: "Please make the entire MCP configuration tailor-made depending on the laptop is using the repo. The goal is to handle the different local paths. For example in .mcp.json I sometimes use /home/luca/Documents/Fargin/mcp-agent-factory but also I occasionally use /home/luca/Documents/Misc/PersonalProjects/mcp-agent-factory" depending on the laptop I am actually working on"
